query:
DELETE FROM task_rotation_occurrence_notes WHERE taskId = 2850001 AND occurrenceNumber = 1;
UPDATE task_rotation_occurrence_notes SET occurrenceNumber = occurrenceNumber - 1 WHERE taskId = 2850001 AND occurrenceNumber > 1;
